overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing a hooded character traversing a foggy mountain landscape. The character begins on a rocky cliff overlooking a misty valley before walking along a narrow trail into a dense pine forest.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain overlook with valley vista

agents.ego_description: standing still on the rocky cliff edge, overlooking the fog-filled valley and distant mountain peaks

entered.detail: snow-capped peaks visible through the atmospheric fog
thick mist filling the valley below the cliff
dark jagged rocks where the character stands
tall evergreen tree on the right side of the frame

segments.scene_description: The character stands on a rocky cliff edge overlooking a vast fog-filled valley with distant mountains barely visible through the haze. The environment is open and exposed, with sparse vegetation and a cool, desaturated atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow forest trail on mountain slope

events.description: character moves from the open cliff overlook into the enclosed forest path with dense tree cover
character begins walking forward along the narrow mountain trail

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow dirt path into the dense pine forest, moving away from the cliff edge

entered.detail: narrow winding dirt path through the trees
steep rock face lining the left side of the trail
thick cluster of evergreen trees surrounding the path

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the open cliff into a narrow, enclosed forest trail. Walking along the dirt path, the surroundings become denser with pine trees and rock walls, blocking the sky and creating a more sheltered, intimate environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from an expansive, exposed cliffside into the sheltered depths of a dense pine forest. It begins with the character standing on a rocky edge overlooking a vast, fog-filled valley where distant mountains are barely visible through a cool, desaturated haze. As the character moves forward, the open vista recedes and the environment shifts toward a narrow dirt trail. The scene then closes in as towering pine trees and steep rock walls rise to block the sky, replacing the airy atmosphere with an intimate, enclosed woodland path.
